string 2:
I thought I was trapped under building rubble... How'd I
get here all of a sudden?!
Hm? Do you know me?

You want me to carry you over there "just like before"? 
What do you mean, "like before"?

I don't have any idea what you're talking about! ...Oops.
Sorry. That came out ruder than I intended...

At any rate, the moment I saw you, I felt this strange
sense of duty... Maybe that's why I'm here?
Fine. I suppose I'll give it a shot! Are you ready to fly?
{next}Yes. Let's go right away.
Not now.{end}
Okay, hang on tight!

Uh-oh. This isn't working... And I get the feeling this
isn't the first time!

Just as I was nearing the final battlefield to offer you my
aid, we were caught up in a strange spatial anomaly.

I have prepared a gate back to your original world, but
given the state of things, I am unsure of its reliability.
[Return to Rebellion Village.]
{end}[Stay here.]

I can feel it... Chronomon is right over there. That means
the Akashic Records must be just beyond...

I need to get there... It's my only hope of fixing this messed
up world!

But first we need to cross over to the other side. 
How are we gonna do that?
Wh-Wh-What?! What in the world is going on?!
H-Hey, look!
Do you wish to return to Rebellion Village?
Yes.
No.{end}

Oh, it's you... Ugh, just when I was starting to think
things couldn't get any worse.

The weapon went berserk and I was thrown out of the cockpit.
Didn't think I'd be saved by a Digimon, though.

Phew. This human was in grave danger. I'm not super confident
in treating humans, but I'm glad I made it in time.
Damn, why are you being so nice to me? It's almost like...
...we were wrong about Digimon all along...

I was nearing the final battlefield to offer you my aid,
but I, too, got caught up in this strange spatial anomaly.

These two have expended a tremendous amount of energy. I
will catch up with you after I have helped them recover.

Other comrades have been sent here with me. Together, we
are ready to fight by your side.

Our will is as one, as is our ultimate destination. We
shall gather at Chronomon's location without fail!

Can you hear the sound of my voice? Excellent. It appears
my efforts were successful.

I am able to combine the unique properties of this place
with my abilities in order to speak to you and you alone.

I was caught in a spatial anomaly while coming to offer
aid. There should be others here also ready to fight!

Our will is as one, as undoubtedly is our destination. We
shall gather together so that we may all set upon Chronomon!

Seems like we have used up too much energy... We will head
out after we have recovered!

I am sure we shall be able to go after a little rest...
Please go on ahead...
You came...

I suppose I owe you for your assistance. I shall repay you
now. Come closer.

Due to my inadequacy as a leader, Chronomon was able to
manipulate many Titans into joining the conflict.

I headed to the battlefield in order to bring my allies to
their senses, but everyone was suddenly dragged here.
Our objective is the same as yours: to defeat Chronomon.

Chronomon has merged with the Akashic Records. As such, 
the system that governs time has identified us as intruders.

It will endlessly summon "memories" etched in the future and 
the past, using those memories to try and eliminate us.

It will be impossible to get to Chronomon at this rate. Therefore, 
this is my chance to pay back all you have done.

Upon my pride as a Titan, I vow to forge a path forward. It
will be no easy task, so I ask that you buy me some time.

If you speak to that one there, you should be able to
rendezvous with my subordinates in the resistance.
Oh, it's been a while, glurp!
{next}Love is limitless!
{end}[Hold off.]
What's the matter? You're not ready yet, glurp?
Are you ready, glurp?
Wh-What did you just say, glurp?!
Aaaah!!
Oh... Look who we have here!
Wait. I remember now.

Lord Plutomon said somethin' about these guys bein'
artificially "created" or somethin' like that!

Yeah, somethin' about "replicas of memories in time." It
made my head hurt, though, so I just stopped listenin'.

Hey, gimme a hand. If we're fightin' copies, we'll do better if 
we work together.

Hehe... Lemme guess. Ya just wanna fight some more, right?
Let's do it, then!

Okay, time fer our special formation! Here comes our brutal
wave attack!

Hey, why do youse get to have all the fun?! I wanna go
next!
We're almost there! Just leave the rest to me!

Well done, everyone. Now the time has come to make our
move!

I don't want to get caught up in this, glurp! H-Hey, I need
to hear a real groaner from you right now, glurp!
If you cry, cry only tears of joy.
Let's work to create a world where everyone can be happy!
Whaaaaa, glurp!
Haggard Cluster!

I don't know how... but we did it, glurp! I was sure we
were done for, glurp!
That should open the path forward. Now, go forth.

I plan to follow after you. We will meet up again at the
site of the Akashic Records!

We're heading this way, glurp? If so, we're going to have
to leap to that building up ahead, glurp.

No problem, glurp. Leave it to me, glurp! Here we go,
glurp!
This is our chance to end this battle!
Miracles can happen as long as you believe!
I'm done.{end}
Whaaaaa, glurp!
Whoa! Simply amazin', Lord Plutomon!

Hey, did ya see that?! They don't get any cooler than good
ol' Lord Plutomon!

Youse nearly got caught up in all this...? Hmph. What
better fate could ya ask for than to die fer Lord Plutomon?!

I'm going to rest here for a while longer. Good luck to
you!

Our next destination is quite far, glurp. This won't be an
easy journey, glurp...

Headaches, diarrhea... I can see it all now. But that's where
you wanna go, right?

Guess it's decided then... it's not like you guys have another
ride... Just checking, you guys HAVE to go, glurp?
{next}Of course.
{end}I can't decide.

Well, we can't head out until you make a decision.
Let me know when you're ready, glurp.

So what did you decide to do? Do you REALLY have to
go there, glurp?

Okay, I'm ready, mentally and emotionally! Come on. 
Hit me with your very best shot, glurp!

Let's see what you've got! I want to hear the greatest
empty platitude in all of history, glurp!

The hope of this world lies with you. You bring hope to us all,
even to somebody as insignificant as me, glurp!
Hm...? Oh, no! I can't believe I said one myself...!
And that was a big one, gluuuuuuurp...!
Hey, is that Marsmon?! And Pegasusmon, too!

I was with Junomon and the others. We need to repay the debt 
we owe to all of you.

The Digimon headed to the final battlefield were thrown
into this place! I've been waiting here to carry you on ahead...

...to carry you to where Chronomon is! And Marsmon here has
been keeping me safe while I waited.

But the enemies keep coming, though! What's more, that
there is Creepymon, of the Seven Great Demon Lords!

I've heard rumors about him, but apparently he's been
summoned by the Akashic Records as well.
Wait. Is he protecting Pegasusmon...?

I don't think he can hold out much longer on his own,
let's go help him.

Urk! No matter how many of them we take down, they just
keep coming!

We'll never reach Chronomon at this rate... You folks, have
Pegasusmon carry you on ahead!
No way!

The only reason we're barely holding on is because we're
fighting together! If we left you behind, then you'd...!

I can still manage to hold out long enough to give you a
chance to fly away.
Forget it! We're not leaving!
In that case, let me fight alongside you.
Big Bro...? Big Bro! It's you!

This is no time for a sentimental reunion, my little brother.
Look. The enemy is starting to ramp it up already!

How long has it been since we fought together...?
Anyway, keep your eyes forward. Let's do this!

It seems like we managed to hold them off for now. I bet
it's not over yet, though...
Big Bro... Is it really you...?
Yeah, it's me. I'm proud of you, little bro.
Big Bro...! I didn't think you'd ever...!

It's all thanks to Lady Venusmon. I may not be completely
cured, but she never gave up and continued to treat me.

You know about this place, right? The Akashic Records seek
to eliminate all intruders.

Chronomon can manifest limitless enemies from the memories
engraved within the "system of time" he merged with.

Yeah, at this rate, we'll never be able to make any
progress...

Well, if we can't make it to Chronomon, I guess there's
only one thing left to do...
I'll hold off the enemy here. You guys go on ahead.
B-Big Bro?
I wouldn't even be here if it weren't for all of you.

I'm simply giving up a life that was already on the brink
of death anyway. I think it's a rather small price to pay.

You're joking, right...? You can't just show up out of
nowhere and try to pull something like this!
I consider this to be my penance...
I took countless lives in the arena.

Even if it wasn't of my own volition, it isn't something
that should go unpunished.
That's why... I've made my choice. I will die here today.

Damn it, Big Bro! You don't understand a thing, do you?!
I've been out here working hard without you even knowing it!

You always protected me, and now I want to stand on my own 
for a change... so I'm not taking any "orders" from you!

I'm staying here, too! This time, I'll be the one watching
YOUR back!
Marsmon...
You'd give up your life alongside me...?

We're not going to die, Big Bro. Because, this time, I'm
here to protect you. Now, the rest of you, get to Chronomon!

Man, this is really rough, glurp... My head hurts, too,
glurp.
But we've come this far, so let's save this world, glurp!
Hraaaaagh, gluuuuurp!
Let's leave this to those two and go on ahead!

Lord Bacchusmon is waiting for us at the next location. Are
you ready to go?
{next}Yes. Let's go right away.
{end}I need some time.
All right, then. Let's go!
All right. Just let me know when you're ready to go, then.

Marsmon and Callismon are determined. Let's leave this to
them and move on.
If you truly insist, little brother... then let's fight together as one!

We've always been together, so we should meet our end
together, too! ...Not that I plan on dying, of course!

With my Big Bro by my side, nobody can stop us. Don't worry
about us. Just go on ahead!

It's because of you that I was reunited with my little
brother. You have my thanks. So leave this to us!

Lord Bacchusmon! Surely this is not the time to be eating
and merrymaking!

Well, it's not like we can get anywhere at the moment,
anyway. Besides, I always think better when I drink!

You always end up turning to the bottle... Didn't you say
you were only going to drink in moderation?
U-Um...
Hm? We're kind of having a moment here— Wait. It's you...!
Ah, perfect timing. Come, revel with us.
You're having a party... here?

We came all this way because of Chronomon... and I imagine
there are other Digimon out here for the same purpose, too.

And, back in our world, Junomon was with us, too. Yes, I
agree everyone is trying to get to Chronomon... but look.
The path is blocked!

Those are Chronomon's wings. He blocked off the path and
we can't advance any further.

So there isn't much else that can be done. Seems like a
good time to throw a party to me!
Seriously?! Why is that always your answer for everything?!
I-If only Sirenmon were with us right now!

Sirenmon said a lot of things, but she never tried to stop
me from drinking.

Yes, because she'd always pick up the slack when you'd
go off and drink!

Can't argue with that. I put poor Sirenmon through a lot, huh.
Now that she's gone, I realize that more than ever...

Besides, those wings would be history by now if you put all
your strength into it!

Hey! It's not like I'm holding back or anything! I really can't
break them right now.

It would take some serious power to destroy wings like
that. I'm so hungry right now that I can't muster the strength.

So that's why I need to have a feast! It's not just about
the booze, you know!

I-I see... I wish you would have just said that from the
beginning. In that case...

...I have a favor to ask of you folks. Take a look over
there.

See that fruit? Eating it should help restore Lord
Bacchusmon's strength!

I would like to see how Lord Bacchusmon responds to eating
just a single piece, so could you go grab one for me?

You want us to just bring you one of those fruits from over
there? Okay, got it.
I appreciate it!

In the meantime, I shall keep an eye on Lord Bacchusmon and
make sure he stays awake after all this drinking!
That's the fruit!

But it doesn't look like we can go any further... What
should we do?
Having trouble getting across?

You look like you're in need of the Palmon Ride Company's
swift and expedient service!
All right, everyone, it's time to get to work!
Ah, one of our regular customers!
It's true! A regular!
One of our best!

Leave everything to us. And feel free to use our service as
much as you like. It's on the house.

I always repay my debts, you see. All right, then. You're
in a hurry, right? Good luck!
Hey, hold on a minute.
This is pretty high up...

Someone should catch the fruit from below... I'll do it. I
can handle this.
Okay. I'll go with you.

I would've been fine on my own. You worry too much... but
thanks, though.
This looks like a good spot. Drop the fruit!
Be careful, Inori!
H-Here it comes! I've got to be sure to catch it...!
Yay, I did it!
I did it... using my own idea... and my own two hands...!
I'll carry it. Now, let's get it to Bacchusmon!

Oh...? OH!! Oh yeah, this is the good stuff! All this flavor...
I'm burning up!
*burp* It's nice and juicy, too!

Poor Sirenmon... This is what she had to deal with on a
daily basis...

Yes, that was quite delicious. I can feel the strength
returning to my body!

My stomach isn't quite full yet, though. I'd like to eat
something nice and cold next!

That went well! Now we just need Lord Bacchusmon to keep
eating fruit!

Next up, we'll need some of that blue fruit. The ones that
look like popsicles!
*yawn* I'm getting kind of sleepy now that I ate.
W-W-Wait, Lord Bacchusmon! You can't sleep right now!

Please! You must bring some chilled fruit that can help
wake Lord Bacchusmon up!

This one is pretty high up there, too, so we should use the
same strategy as last time.

Okay, Inori and I will catch the fruit as it falls. We'll
be waiting down below!
Gently... Carefully...!
...I caught it!
Yikes!
Inori, this way! Run!
Inori, are you all right?
I'm fine, but... Oh, no! The blue fruit...!

There's no time to look for another fruit now. What do we
do?
Okay, I'll go get it! Wait here for me, Inori.
I'll get that blue fruit you caught for us!

Are you sure? Those Digimon will probably attack if you get
too close...
{next}I'll go, too.
Inori, you wait for us here!
...All right. I'll be waiting.
Thank goodness!
Thank you so much, you two!
Okay, let's go see Bacchusmon!

Mmmmmm! I felt that right in the brain! I can't get enough
of that feeling!
*burp* Wow, it's quite filling, too!
*sigh* I miss Sirenmon...
Ah, that was pretty tasty, too! But I could still eat a bit more...

My stomach needs something nice and pungent. And I need to
be in top shape if I'm going to be taking on Chronomon, too.

Next up bring him some of that purple fruit! It looks poisonous,
even, but I bet that means it packs quite a bite!
*yawn* I'm starting to get sleepy again...

W-W-Wait, Lord Bacchusmon! Please, just hang on for a
little longer!

This next fruit will be the last one. We've been stuck here
for a little too long, so please hurry!

This one is pretty high up there, too. We know the drill by
now!

Inori and I will catch the fruit as it falls again. We'll
be waiting down below!
Okay, I've got this... Trust me.
Nice one, Inori!

I really wanted to catch it by myself. There's only so much
I can contribute, but... at least I can do something!

It's almost like I could see the fruit stop in midair. But I was
focusing so hard, I thought I saw something weird, too.

Out of the corner of my eye, it-it looked like something just
exploded...? Anyway, I'm just glad I was able to catch it.
Hey, Inori! Watch out!

Are those enemies that were summoned by the Akashic
Records? And what's THAT?!
{next}Leave this to me and go on ahead!
But, these are no ordinary Digimon!
{next}We can't let the fruit get damaged in battle.

Y-You're right. If the fruit gets smashed, it'll take us
forever to find another one.
And we can't waste any more time in this space.

We need to get this fruit to Bacchusmon and make our way to
Chronomon.
All right. Let's leave this to {player}, then.
Yep! We'll meet up again later. Good luck, {player}.
I'm all finished here, ma'am!
Same here!
It's been a while since I got such a good workout.

Hmph. I didn't need any help, you know. I'm not the same
weakling I used to be.
Ugh, you just don't forget, do you?

Indeed, we know you're perfectly capable of handling
yourself in a fight.
Why thank you! I'm pleasantly surprised to hear you admit it.

I must thank you as well. You protected Lord Bacchusmon and
everyone else.

And, thanks to you, the three of us were able to have a
little fun out there. It really had been a while.
You're right about that. It felt quite nostalgic.
Haha... Yes, I suppose it was rather enjoyable.

Now, then... We have defeated the enemy, so it's time for
our cooperation to come to an end.

Yes, we don't really see eye to eye on many things, but
it's not like I wanted you dead or anything.

So although we worked well together, it's time for us to
say goodbye!
Best of luck out there, I guess!

Your friends brought a purple fruit for us! I'll go on
back now. Please head back to Lord Bacchusmon, too!
Oh, {player}!
I'm glad you're okay!

We just got back, too. It was hard carrying the fruit while
trying to avoid enemies.

Even Gryphonmon went to help... It was no easy task trying
to keep Lord Bacchusmon awake by myself.

You were trying to keep me awake? It was your endless
lecturing that made me sleepy in the first place!

Anyway, I'll take that fruit from you. It's time I ate up
and got going.
Please, bring the purple fruit!

Oh, oooooh...? Yeah, this stank, it's attacking my tastebuds...
my toungue almost feels numb! Exactly what I needed!

All right, my stomach's full and my strength has returned.
Just give me one more moment!
Okay, let's do this!
Oh! This should be exciting!
We're about to see just what Lord Bacchusmon is capable of!
Yaaaaaaaaah!
Hehe. See what I can do on a full stomach?!
He pulverized Chronomon's wings like they were nothing!

Now we can proceed forward! It will not be long before we can
reach Chronomon!

If hunger and drowsiness overtook me, this would've taken
us much longer.

And the natural laws of this world have been crumbling
the entire time!

Sirenmon would have been very disappointed if we got stuck
in a place like this...

All right, you folks simply need to take this path and keep
going straight ahead!

You should run into Neptunemon eventually. We were
separated because of those wings that blocked the path.
Whamon is waiting for you up ahead.

I used up quite a bit of energy just now, so I'll follow
you after I've gotten some more to eat.

Once I'm full, I can help you take on any opponent. Now,
hurry up and bring me more food!

Understood! We'll make sure that your stomach is well
taken care of, Lord Bacchusmon!
We promise to send Lord Bacchusmon on after you!

We'll defeat Chronomon and raise our glasses to celebrate!
The tales of our drinking will be legendary!
Hahahahaha!
Thank goodness! You did it!

Just like Junomon and Bacchusmon, I found myself
transported here before I knew it.

This path leads to the ocean floor. My allies are being
attacked, so I need you to help them.
Please let me know when you are ready.
Are you ready to go?
Yes.
No.{end}
Come here, Whamon!
Whale, then! Let's get going!
Hang on tight!
We have arrived!

I think I'll go back and check on the two brothers now.
Please take care of things in this realm for me!

If we're stuck for the moment, we might as well enjoy a
nice feast. Maybe that will help a good idea come to mind.

You go look for the fruit, and I shall ensure that Lord
Bacchusmon does not fall asleep!

Lord Bacchusmon, Sirenmon would have never forgiven you if
you got plastered in a place like this!
Drop that fruit!
Look! The fruit is safe and sound. Great catch, Inori!
Don't worry! I won't let the fruit fall through my hands!
Phew... I'm glad that went well.

I know I said I'd catch it no problem, but I was actually
pretty nervous!

*sigh* That wasn't very filling, and now I'm kind of
sleepy. I feel my eyelids... getting heavy...

If Lord Bacchusmon falls asleep, we are done for! I shall
do what I can here, so go and find that blue fruit!

Sirenmon would not have been pleased if it could see you
sleeping here, Lord Bacchusmon! You should... *nag, nag*

I think I got the hang of it after that last catch! I've
got this!

I'm here to protect Inori, so you just focus on dropping
that fruit down at just the right time!

*yawn* I'm starting to drift... If I don't eat something
stimulating soon, I'm likely to doze off...

We need that purple fruit... quickly! Lord Bacchusmon is
about to lose consciousness if we do not act soon!

There's value in subordinates who are willing to speak their minds, 
you know, Lord Bacchusmon! You ought to... *nag, nag*

I think I was born to catch things out of the sky! I'm
starting to get more and more confident!

Have you done this before, Inori? You're awfully good at
it. At any rate, I'll keep you safe, so you just focus!

Can a person make a living catching fruit? Maybe I should
think about finding a job like this somewhere.

Okay, this fruit should be the last one. Let's hurry and
get it back to Bacchusmon!

Ungh... I'm really starving here... Can't anyone find any
fruit to bring me?

I shall remain here and support our allies when they
arrive! You folks go meet up with Whamon!

We promise to send Lord Bacchusmon on after you! Honestly,
Lord Bacchusmon's appetite gets out of control sometimes.
Whale, there you are. I've been waiting for you!

It seems too much of the enemy's poison made my memory go a
bit fuzzy.

It took some time, but the poison is finally out of my
system! In fact, I'm better than ever!

Naturally, I know what I'm expected to do. I'll take you to
Lady Venusmon and Lord Neptunemon whenever you're ready!
Whale, should we head out now?
{next}Yes. Let's go right away.
{end}I need some time.

Do you still have the conch? I'd like to hear it once again,
for the morale boost!

Whale, whale! Consider my spirits lifted! Okay, then, let's
gooooo!

You need more time to prepare? Just give me a shout when
you're ready to go!
Whale, hop in!

We can't get through here. And just when we're trying to
get to Chronomon, too!

It's hopeless without Bacchusmon's help, but we'll need to
bring some fruit first!

Ah, it finally went through! Can you hear me now? It's
Simmons! I'm trying to contact you via the Digiline.

There was a large rift that opened up above the city and
swallowed the surrounding areas. And it's expanding, too!

We're okay, luckily we were underground at the time. 
But it's only a matter of time until the rift expands to us here.

Maybe the areas that were swallowed were merged with this
world...?

We need to end this battle as quickly as possible! If we
don't act fast, there'll be no going back!
We have to hurry. Let's ask Whamon for help!
You mustn't try to do too much.
Oh, I'll protect MarineAngemon from any and all danger!
Arrr! Marine! Marine!
Hahaha! That was some good exercise!

Please allow me to thank you. Your aid could not have come
at a better time.
If you are seeking a way forward, ask Submarimon for help.

Here you are! I'm usually the one who keeps people waiting,
but, this time, it was you.
Quickly, this way! Lady Venusmon is waiting for you!

Bacchusmon must have told you everything! We also were on
our way to Chronomon.

The situation here is rather grim. As you can see,
Neptunemon and the others are engaged in battle.

The enemy was summoned by the Akashic Records and
is based on one of the Seven Great Demon Lords.
We need to go help him!

No, there is a more pressing matter to attend to first. We
must rescue and treat our injured allies.

I am going to go help our allies who have been injured in
battle now. I ask that you accompany me.

It is Neptunemon's wish as well that you prioritize
rescuing the others.

Is that really the best plan? It sure looks like Neptunemon
is at a serious disadvantage...

Neptunemon is defending our injured allies while trying to fight
at the same time. That's why he's being pushed back.

Neptunemon is defending the injured while trying to fight
at the same time. That has led to our current situation.

We must focus on helping the injured, so that Neptunemon
can concentrate on fighting.
Yes, I suppose you're right.
I'd like to try and help treat the wounded.
So you're staying here?
Yes, I think that's where I'm most useful right now.

We're going with Venusmon, so it looks like we'll be
separated for a little while...

Don't worry. I've faced all kinds of dangers and managed to
get through them unharmed before, right?

I support this plan. If there are too many of us,
it will only slow us down and delay our rescue efforts.

I guess you're right. We need to get to the Akashic Records...
to Chronomon as soon as possible!

The injured here are protected by our allies from the sea.
They are in good hands.

All right. Just promise me you'll be careful, okay? We'll
go rescue the other injured Digimon.
All right. You be careful, too.

The medical team is just up ahead. They often provide me
with assistance. I plan to stop by there first.

I usually strategize with the talkative Kamemon that leads
the team. Now then, follow me!
Hey, glad you're all okay! Hah, I know that you remember me.

I'm now the leader of team Ka-medical! A medical team that
supports Lady Venusmon!
I'm no Mega yet, but I did manage to make team leader!
Kamemon, please explain the situation to our friends here.

Sure thing, Lady Venusmon! And don't worry, I've come
up with a plan!

There are numerous injured Digimon up ahead, but the place is
crawling with enemies. We never know when they'll strike.

I need you to break down the wall standing in our way!
I'm sure there are enemies so please clear a path for us!

Once the coast is clear, I'll send in the medical team.
They'll tend to the wounded there once they arrive!

The medical team is fully prepared! Once we arrive on the
scene, we'll get right to treating the injured!

That sounds like a good plan. You probably could have
explained it in fewer words, but a good plan, nonetheless.

Let us use Kamemon's plan, then. Will you go on ahead and
clear a path so that they can advance?

Okay, people! Hop to it! We'll follow behind you once
we've confirmed it's safe!
Look... Help has arrived... We're... saved...!

You made it! We'll fight alongside you. Time for a
counterattack!
Phew... The enemy has been defeated.

Thank you, friends! You have our gratitude as well, Lady
Venusmon!
Ugh... How embarrassing to be seen like this!
